description: A clinical neuropsychologist is evaluating cognitive decline using PEBL Trail Making Test (TMT) data located at ~/pebl/data/tmt_click_log.csv. Analyze the click-level logs (columns: 'participant_id', 'test_part', 'error_flag', 'rt_ms') to calculate Total Time (sum of 'rt_ms' converted to seconds) and Total Errors (sum of 'error_flag') for Parts A and B, as well as derived metrics: B-A Cost (Total Time B - Total Time A) and B/A Ratio (Total Time B / Total Time A). Identify and exclude the automated UI testing artifact (participant 'P99') from the group analysis. Export the results to ~/pebl/analysis/tmt_report.json. The JSON must include a 'participants' list where each object contains 'id', 'tmt_a_time_s', 'tmt_b_time_s', 'tmt_a_errors', 'tmt_b_errors', 'b_minus_a_cost_s', and 'b_over_a_ratio' (or 'excluded': true and a 'reason' for P99). Additionally, include top-level keys 'group_mean_b_minus_a_cost_s' and 'group_mean_b_over_a_ratio' calculated across all valid participants.
